    <h2 {...{

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-messaging-581"
    }}>{`iOS Messaging 5.8.1`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixes a bug where if the user is being returned a holdout treatment for a content card, an OOM crash could occur`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Updates dependency version of Core to 5.7.0 which moves the event history database to Application Support directory`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "september-22-2025"
    }}>{`September 22, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-core-570"
    }}>{`iOS Core 5.7.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Migrates EventHistory database from `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Caches`}</inlineCode>{` directory to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Application Support`}</inlineCode>{` directory.`}
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`NOTE:`}</strong>{` - if you use the Messaging extension, it is strongly recommended that you upgrade to this version of the Core/Services SDK.`}</li>
        </ul>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`EventHistory initialization now happens on the Event Hub's queue.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "september-5-2025"

    <h3 {...{

    }}>{`iOS Core 5.6.2`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Improved stability by removing calls to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`objc_copyClassList`}</inlineCode>{` used for extension discovery during simplified initialization.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Have added Unified proposition track for content card and code based experiences.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support for native handling of JavaScript events via `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`handleJavascriptMessage`}</inlineCode>{` API.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{

    <ul>

      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support for display tracking of multiple offers.`}</li>

      "id": "android-edgeconsent-302"
    }}>{`Android EdgeConsent 3.0.2`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Optimized Consent by suppressing repeated `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Consent.update()`}</inlineCode>{` calls received within on second if the consent preferences do not change.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fix issue where consent preferences were not merged correctly on the device when using deeply nested consents structure.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-messaging-350"
    }}>{`Android Messaging 3.5.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support for large image and image only content card templates`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Optimized push identifier updates to only sync updates with the server if the push identifier changes. Optimization may be disabled by setting configuration `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`messaging.optimizePushSync`}</inlineCode>{` to false.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support for `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`MobileCore.resetIdentities()`}</inlineCode>{` API which will clear the stored push identifier.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-messaging-580"
    }}>{`iOS Messaging 5.8.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support for large image and image only content card templates`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Optimized push identifier updates to only sync updates with the server if the push identifier changes. Optimization may be disabled by setting configuration `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`messaging.optimizePushSync`}</inlineCode>{` to false.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support for `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`MobileCore.resetIdentities()`}</inlineCode>{` API which will clear the stored push identifier.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-messaging-340"
    }}>{`Android Messaging 3.4.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adds support for retrieving custom key/value pairs from in-app messages using the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Message.metadata`}</inlineCode>{` API.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adds support for content card qualification, dismiss, and disqualification using event history operation rules.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed a bug preventing the on-device caches from being properly updated when the requested surface contains no eligible messages.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-messaging-570"
    }}>{`iOS Messaging 5.7.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adds support for retrieving custom key/value pairs from in-app messages using the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Message.metadata`}</inlineCode>{` API.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adds support for content card qualification, dismiss, and disqualification using event history operation rules.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed a bug preventing the on-device caches from being properly updated when the requested surface contains no eligible messages.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-core-560"
    }}>{`iOS Core 5.6.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adds rules engine support for the new event history operations `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`insert`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`insertIfNotExists`}</inlineCode>{`.`}
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`insert`}</inlineCode>{` unconditionally records consequence content as an event history entry.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`insertIfNotExists`}</inlineCode>{` records the entry only when no existing record shares the same hash.`}</li>
        </ul>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adds support for the new `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`mostRecent`}</inlineCode>{` historical condition type, which allows rules engine to evaluate the most recently occurring event from a list of events.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-optimize-361"
    }}>{`Android Optimize 3.6.1`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed callback conflict where error was not delivered when both success and error were triggered.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Upgraded `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`aepsdk-commons`}</inlineCode>{` to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`3.4.1`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`aepsdk-core-android`}</inlineCode>{` to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`3.5.0`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`aepsdk-edge-android`}</inlineCode>{` to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`3.0.2`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "july-23-2025"
    }}>{`July 23, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-core-350"
    }}>{`Android Core 3.5.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed an issue causing incorrect inset calculation for in-app messages.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adds rules engine support for the new event history operations `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`insert`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`insertIfNotExists`}</inlineCode>{`.`}
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`insert`}</inlineCode>{` unconditionally records consequence content as an event history entry.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`insertIfNotExists`}</inlineCode>{` records the entry only when no existing record shares the same hash.`}</li>
        </ul>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adds support for the new `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`mostRecent`}</inlineCode>{` historical condition type, which allows rules engine to evaluate the most recently occurring event from a list of events.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "july-10-2025"
    }}>{`July 10, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "roku-sdk-131"
    }}>{`Roku SDK 1.3.1`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Case-sensitive XDM keys:`}</strong>{` Resolved an issue where`}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`identityMap`}</inlineCode>{` keys were incorrectly lowercased, which caused each Edge event to be assigned a new ECID. The Roku SDK now ensures proper case preservation, ensuring consistent ECID handling.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Integer overflow in cookie expiration:`}</strong>{` Fixed an edge case that caused 32-bit integer overflow when calculating cookie expiration by switching to 64-bit LongInteger.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Improved sendMediaEvent validation:`}</strong>{` Added error logging for invalid playhead values and updated documentation and sample app to clarify expected input behavior.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "june-24-2025"
    }}>{`June 24, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-core-552"
    }}>{`iOS Core 5.5.2`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fix an issue where FullScreenMessage's onDismiss is called before dismissal.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "june-17-2025"
    }}>{`June 17, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-core-551"
    }}>{`iOS Core 5.5.1`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed an issue causing incorrect rule evaluation of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`notContains`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`notEquals`}</inlineCode>{` conditions when checking against multiple values.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Exposed `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Decodable.fromDictionary`}</inlineCode>{` helper method in AEPServices.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "june-12-2025"
    }}>{`June 12, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-optimize-560"
    }}>{`iOS Optimize 5.6.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added activity and placement object fields to OptimizeProposition class.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed event data in Optimize Response Event sent to update proposition api callback to properly display proposition and error data in Assurance.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-core-341"
    }}>{`Android Core 3.4.1`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added edge-to-edge support for in-app messages when enforced by the device OS.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed an issue causing incorrect rule evaluation of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`notContains`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`notEquals`}</inlineCode>{` conditions when checking against multiple values.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Disabled WebSQL for in-app message web views.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Improved stability when processing Activity intent extras.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-campaign-classic-314"
    }}>{`Android Campaign Classic 3.1.4`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed the handling of negative 32-bit broadlog IDs.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-assurance-307"
    }}>{`Android Assurance 3.0.7`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Removed device orientation restrictions for Assurance screens.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-optimize-360"
    }}>{`Android Optimize 3.6.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`OptimizeProposition`}</inlineCode>{` class now exposes `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`activity`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`placement`}</inlineCode>{` objects for all propositions that belongs to Offer Decisioning.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <ul>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-messaging-332"
    }}>{`Android Messaging 3.3.2`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support for "fit to content" and "max width" in in-app messaging.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added gif support for push notifications on Android OS 14+ when using the Messaging extension to display push notifications.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed a logging error within the ContentCardUIProvider.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "may-12-2025"
    }}>{`May 12, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-core-340"
    }}>{`Android Core 3.4.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support of "Max width" and "Fit to content" for in-app messages via`}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`InAppMessageSettings`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-core-550"
    }}>{`iOS Core 5.5.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed issue where `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`MobileCore.initialize`}</inlineCode>{` registered multiple Analytics extensions.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Removed call to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`CTCarrier`}</inlineCode>{` API for iOS 16+ as Apple deprecated it without replacement. Calling `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`SystemInfoService.getMobileCarrierName`}</inlineCode>{` on iOS 16 and above will now always return nil.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support for "Fit to content" in `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`FullscreenMessage`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support of "Max width" and "Fit to content" for in-app messages via `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`MessageSettings`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "may-8-2025"
    }}>{`May 8, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{

    }}>{`iOS Optimize 5.5.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added generateDisplayInteractionXdm public API for a list of offers.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added and unwrapped weak self in Optimize's onRegistered to avoid crash.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-optimize-340"
    }}>{`Android Optimize 3.4.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Enhanced error handling: Added support for managing invalid requests gracefully.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`New API Available: Introduced `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`[List<Offer>.displayed()]`}</inlineCode>{` to track batched display proposition events for multiple offers displayed simultaneously on a screen.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-optimize-540"
    }}>{`iOS Optimize 5.4.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added processing of listeners asynchronously inside serial queue to solve race condition issue.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added a new API to support display tracking of multiple offers.`}</li>
    </ul>

      <li parentName="ul">{`Updated to use BOM `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/com.adobe.marketing.mobile/sdk-bom"
        }}>{`(Bill of Materials)`}</a>{` for Android SDK dependencies.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "offer-decisioning-and-target-extension-110"
    }}>{`Offer Decisioning and Target extension 1.1.0`}</h3>
    <p>{`Added configuration capability to the Offer Decisioning and Target extension in the Tags UI for mobile Tag Properties.`}</p>
    <p>{`Users can now configure:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Request timeout - Set the amount of time (in seconds) to wait for a response from the decisioning services before timing out.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-optimize-330"
    }}>{`Android Optimize 3.3.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`[Breaking Change]`}</strong>{` Updated Offer Score data type of from `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Integer`}</inlineCode>{` to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Double`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Optimize SDK only listens to preview events if it contains `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`debug`}</inlineCode>{` object with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`eventType`}</inlineCode>{` as `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`com.adobe.eventType.edge`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`eventSource`}</inlineCode>{` as `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`personalization:decisions`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-messaging-330"
    }}>{`Android Messaging 3.3.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Introduced support for out-of-the-box content card UI rendering using the new `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`ContentCardUIProvider.getContentCardUI()`}</inlineCode>{` API to create and display the views for templated content cards.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support to display an in-app message when the app is opened by a push notification interaction. To support this workflow, new `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`updatePropositionsForSurfaces(List<Surface> surfaces, AdobeCallback<Boolean> callback)`}</inlineCode>{`API has been added to fetch propositions for the provided surfaces with an optional completion handler that provides a boolean status.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "android-optimize-323"
    }}>{`Android Optimize 3.2.3`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added support for the Array type in the JSON structure of Offer Content.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h3 {...{

    <ul>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "january-16-2025"
    }}>{`January 16, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-messaging-560"
    }}>{`iOS Messaging 5.6.0`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed a bug that caused dark/light image to be switched when the app enters background.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The schemaData property, representing the associated `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`ContentCardSchemaData`}</inlineCode>{` of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`ContentCardUI`}</inlineCode>{`, is now publicly accessible.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Added API `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`updatePropositionsForSurfaces(_:completion:)`}</inlineCode>{` to fetch propositions for the provided surfaces with an optional completion handler that provides a boolean status.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "ios-core-532"
    }}>{`iOS Core 5.3.2`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fixed an issue where in-app message was not reframed in split screen mode.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "january-14-2025"
    }}>{`January 14, 2025`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "react-native-new-architecture-support"
    }}>{`React Native new architecture Support`}</h3>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`Updated Places Module Name`}</strong><br parentName="p"></br>{`
`}{`Added compatibility for the new architecture in the Places React Native module.  `}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ul">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`New sample app with new architecture enabled`}</strong><br parentName="p"></br>{`
`}{`Enabled the new architecture in the Sample App.`}<br parentName="p"></br>{`
`}<strong parentName="p">{`Link:`}</strong>{` `}<a parentName="p" {...{
            "href": "https://github.com/adobe/aepsdk-react-native/tree/main/apps/AEPSampleAppNewArchEnabled"
          }}>{`AEPSampleAppNewArchEnabled`}</a>{`  `}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ul">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`New architecture Compatibility Testing`}</strong><br parentName="p"></br>{`
`}{`Tested new architecture enabled sample app with Adobe Experience Platform Mobile React Native modules via interop layer (new architecture not supported for Adobe Campaign Classic).`}</p>
      </li>
    </ul>

      "id": "react-native-places-603"

    </ul>
